gate_verdicts.reason: Evidence names a real cause (alpha widget adoption) but the name does not carry it; 'unique' is a vague descriptor (R7) and not a source noun (R10). No coined catalog name means the same cause, so no wording-only rewrite is possible.

Evidence is about beta segment pricing power, but the name replaces the causal noun with the vague descriptor 'unique' (R7/R10 break). No existing coined catalog name covers this cause, so it cannot be rewritten without inventing a name.
Both companies' quotes mean the identical cause: crude oil price as a fuel-cost input (same object, scope, mechanism). Familiar market-driver form per R5; clearly reusable across companies.

BBB (ground vs air) and CCC (next-day courier services) are both composition shifts in parcel delivery services — one reusable variable, different states. Distinct object and mechanism from restaurant_delivery_channel_mix, so correctly kept separate.

Reusable channel-mix cause (delivery share vs dine-in of restaurant orders); follows R3 word order and segment-specific naming is allowed. Not SAME_AS parcel_delivery_mix — different object (restaurant orders vs parcel logistics) and mechanism.

Standard financial phrase kept whole (R6); both quotes attribute the cause to the same company-wide metric. 'comparable_sales' is a true synonym variant (same object/scope/mechanism) properly held as a SAME_AS variant, not a separate driver.
